prompt: Use openagentsbtw plus the taste-images skill, sourced from upstream image-taste-frontend in Leonxlnx/taste-skill. Route this through hephaestus-style frontend implementation on the utility profile. Apply the upstream Taste rules exactly while preserving existing app architecture and completing real production frontend changes. Resolve discoverable ambiguity from repo/system evidence before asking questions; ask only for intent ambiguity that materially changes correctness or scope. Do not return scaffolding, prototypes, toy/demo code, placeholder comments, or docs-only churn in place of implementation. When image generation is available, prefer GPT Image 2 for frontend reference generation, then deeply inspect the generated image and implement from it; when image generation is unavailable, write the precise image-generation prompt/spec first and implement from that spec.
